title: StreamRouteMessage
description: Routing policy sent from VJ server to DJ clients, indicating how audio should be streamed and what configuration to use.

route_mode.description: relay: DJ sends audio to VJ only. dual: DJ sends to VJ and directly to Minecraft.

is_active.description: Whether this DJ is the currently active DJ.

minecraft_host.description: Minecraft server hostname for direct connections.

minecraft_port.description: Minecraft WebSocket port for direct connections.

entity_count.description: Number of display entities in the active zone.

pattern_scripts.description: Map of pattern name to Lua script source.

preset.description: Currently active audio preset name (e.g. auto, edm, chill).

relay_fallback.description: Whether relay mode is available as fallback.

reason.description: Human-readable reason for the routing decision.
